calendar.matters:
Motion To File Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint Under Seal
Off Calendar Aug-02-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS DANIAL MAHYARI and REVEALROX'S Motion To File Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint Under Seal:

Plaintiff's application to file portions of complaint under seal is granted. No opposition filed, and the application complies with California Rules of Court, Rules 2.550 and 2.551. The Court finds that there exists an overriding interest that overcomes the right of public access to the portions of the records to be sealed; the overriding interest supports sealing those records; a substantial probability exists that the overriding interest will be prejudiced if the record is not sealed; the proposed sealing is narrowly tailored; and no less restrictive means exist to achieve the overriding interest. The complaint filed on February 26, 2018, shall be sealed, and Plaintiff shall file a redacted complaint in its stead.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
